# Quota Invoice

> Free online invoice generator. Create and download professional PDF invoices instantly — no sign-up, no data stored on servers.

Quota Invoice is a client-side web application for freelancers and small businesses to create professional invoices in seconds. All processing happens in the browser; no invoice data is ever sent to a server.

## Features

- Fill in sender and client details (name, email, address, phone)
- Upload a company logo (PNG, JPG, SVG — compressed client-side)
- Add unlimited line items with per-line quantity, unit price, discount %, and tax %
- Supports 170+ currencies with correct decimal formatting (e.g. JPY has 0 decimals, KWD has 3)
- Invoice-level discount field
- Automatic discount summary and tax summary tables grouped by rate
- Live PDF preview via floating button
- Download a professional A4 PDF instantly — no server round-trip
- No account, no email, no tracking of invoice content

## Pages

- [Home / Invoice Generator](https://quota.live): The single-page invoice generator. Users fill a form and download a PDF.

## Tech

Built with Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, @react-pdf/renderer (client-side PDF), dinero.js (precise currency arithmetic), and Zod (form validation). Hosted on Vercel.

## Intended audience

Freelancers, contractors, consultants, and small business owners who need to send invoices quickly without creating an account or uploading sensitive data to a third-party service.
